content.problemStatement:
You are given a list of NNN strings. Your task is to find the **longest common prefix** shared by all the strings.

If there is **no common prefix**, return an empty string (`""`).

Function DeclarationFunction NamelongestCommonPrefixlongestCommonPrefixlongestCommonPrefix – This function finds the longest common prefix among a list of strings.

Parameters
strsstrsstrs : A reference to a vector of strings containing NNN strings.
Return Value
Returns a **string** representing the longest common prefix among all given strings.
Returns an **empty string (`""`)** if no common prefix exists.
constraints: All characters are lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the number of strings. The next N lines each contain a string consisting of lowercase English letters (a‑z). Strings may be empty.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing the longest common prefix of the N strings. If there is no common prefix, output an empty line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: All four strings share the prefix "inter", which is the longest possible common prefix.
The strings start with "ap"; the third character differs, so "ap" is the longest common prefix.
The first characters are different, therefore there is no common prefix.

solution.approach: The longest common prefix can be found by vertical scanning. First determine the length of the shortest string (minLen). Then iterate position i from 0 to minLen‑1 and compare the character at position i in all strings. As soon as a mismatch is found, stop; the prefix built so far is the answer. If no mismatch occurs, the whole shortest string is the common prefix. This runs in O(N * L) where L is the length of the shortest string, which is optimal because every character of the answer must be examined.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N * L) per test case, where L is the length of the shortest string among the N strings.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) extra space besides the input storage and the output prefix.
